title: Aether Cloud Storage Structures
description: A simple, and hopefully functional datapack that moves Cloud Storage's structures to the Aether dimension. To gate the content efficiently, I recommend disabling the balloon salesman villager and removing Cloud Storage mob spawns from the overworld.
body: A simple datapack that relocates the Big Balloon and Sky Temple structures from Cloud Storage to spawn in the Aether dimension. To best gate progression behind the aether, I recommend disabling natural spawning of the mobs as well as removing the balloon stand from generating, but still leaving the villager enabled so the player can set one up later.
